KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: SeaMtlyInfoService/getDailyWaveBuoy.
data_type.title: Data Type

month.description: KMA APIHub request parameter month. Official parameter name: month. Operation: SeaMtlyInfoService/getDailyWaveBuoy.
month.title: Month

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: SeaMtlyInfoService/getDailyWaveBuoy.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: SeaMtlyInfoService/getDailyWaveBuoy.
page_no.title: Page No

station.description: KMA APIHub request parameter station. Official parameter name: station. Operation: SeaMtlyInfoService/getDailyWaveBuoy.
station.title: Station

year.description: KMA APIHub request parameter year. Official parameter name: year. Operation: SeaMtlyInfoService/getDailyWaveBuoy.
year.title: Year
